name: SAN BIAN SCIENCE& TECHNOLOGY Co., LTD.
summary: SAN BIAN SCIENCE& TECHNOLOGY Co., LTD. produces and sells large and medium size transformers in China and internationally. Its principal products include oil immersed power transformers, dry-type transformers, transformers for petrifaction, combined transformers, amorphous alloy transformers, combined transformer substations, low voltage cable branch boxes and distribution equipment, special transformers, and others. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Taizhou, China.
